goal: Attack gloves: fractured T1 flat damage, +2 Projectiles, crit damage and additional-projectile chance.
name: +2 Projectiles (Ice Shot / Twisters)

steps.title: Start with the base gloves
steps.detail: Get an Exceptional "Secured Wraps" base to craft on.

note.text: Kolr's Hunt adds the Marksman influence that unlocks the +2 Projectiles mod.

items.name: Kolr's Hunt
items.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a pair of Gloves to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved or replaced.

steps.title: Insert Kolr's Hunt
steps.detail: Socket Kolr's Hunt into the gloves.

items.name: Perfect Orb of Augmentation
items.description: Augments a Magic item with a new random modifier

steps.title: Use a Perfect Orb of Augmentation

items.name: Perfect Regal Orb
items.description: Upgrades a Magic item to a Rare item, adding 1 modifier

items.name: Chaos Orb
items.description: Removes a random modifier and augments a Rare item with a new random modifier

items.name: Orb of Annulment
items.description: Removes a random modifier from an item

steps.title: Roll a T1 flat damage prefix
steps.detail: Use Chaos Orbs and Orbs of Annulment until you roll a Tier 1 prefix such as T1 Lightning, Fire or Physical Damage to Attacks.

targets.text: Adds # to # Lightning Damage to Attacks
Adds # to # Fire Damage to Attacks
Adds # to # Physical Damage to Attacks

items.name: Fracturing Orb
items.description: Fracture a random modifier on a rare item with at least 4 modifiers, locking it in place.

items.name: Preserved Rib
items.description: Desecrates a Rare Armour

steps.title: Fracture the T1 prefix
steps.detail: Use a Fracturing Orb with a Preserved Rib to fracture the T1 prefix.

branches.text: The T1 prefix is fractured — continue to the next step.
It fractured the wrong mod — start over from the beginning.

items.name: Chaos Orb
items.description: Removes a random modifier and augments a Rare item with a new random modifier

steps.title: Chaos spam for +2 Projectiles
steps.detail: Chaos spam the fractured gloves until you hit the +2 Projectiles modifier.

targets.text: +2 to Level of all Projectile Skills

items.name: Omen of Sinistral Exaltation
items.description:
While this item is active in your inventory your next
Exalted Orb will add only prefix modifiers

items.name: Exalted Orb
items.description: Augments a Rare item with a new random modifier

items.name: Omen of Sinistral Crystallisation
items.description:
While this item is active in your inventory your next
Perfect or Corrupted Essence will remove only Prefix modifiers

items.name: Essence of Hysteria
items.description: Removes a random modifier and augments a Rare item with a new guaranteed modifier

steps.title: Guarantee the Critical Damage suffix
steps.detail: Use Omen of Sinistral Exaltation + Exalted Orb, then Omen of Sinistral Crystallisation + Essence of Hysteria to guarantee Critical Damage on a suffix.

items.name: Ancient Rib
items.description: Desecrates a Rare Armour

items.name: Omen of Dextral Necromancy
items.description:
While this item is active in your inventory your next
Desecration attempt will add only suffix modifiers

items.name: Omen of Light
items.description:
While this item is active in your inventory your next
Orb of Annulment will remove only Desecrated modifiers

items.name: Omen of Abyssal Echoes
items.description:
While this item is active in your inventory the next time you
reveal Desecrated modifiers you can reroll the options once

items.name: Orb of Annulment
items.description: Removes a random modifier from an item

steps.title: Unveil the additional-projectile suffix
steps.detail: Use an Ancient Rib with Omen of Dextral Necromancy, Omen of Light and Omen of Abyssal Echoes to unveil a suffix — you want "+#% Surpassing chance to Fire an Additional Projectile". Annul and repeat until you hit it.

targets.text: #% Surpassing chance to Fire an Additional Projectile

items.name: Exalted Orb
items.description: Augments a Rare item with a new random modifier

steps.title: Exalt the open prefix
steps.detail: Use a Greater or Perfect Exalted Orb to fill a prefix.

items.name: Omen of Whittling
items.description:
While this item is active in your inventory your next
Chaos Orb will remove the lowest level modifier

items.name: Chaos Orb
items.description: Removes a random modifier and augments a Rare item with a new random modifier

steps.title: Whittle to the final prefix
steps.detail: Use Omen of Whittling + Chaos Orb to reroll the lowest-level mod until you land a desirable final prefix.

branches.text: If the whittle hits a bad mod (like Runic Ward): insert Astrid's Creativity, then use Sovereign Alloy + Omen of Sinistral Crystallisation to safely remove the prefix, and keep whittling.

items.name: Astrid's Creativity
items.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in any Equipment to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.

items.name: Sovereign Alloy
items.description: Removes a random modifier and augments a Rare item with a new guaranteed modifier

items.name: Omen of Sinistral Crystallisation
items.description:
While this item is active in your inventory your next
Perfect or Corrupted Essence will remove only Prefix modifiers

result.text: +2 to Level of all Projectile Skills
Adds # to # Lightning Damage to Attacks
Adds # to # Fire Damage to Attacks
Adds # to # Physical Damage to Attacks
#% Surpassing chance to Fire an Additional Projectile
